accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill; the definition of Facility Security Committee and key requirements are correctly described.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: requiring FSCs to respond to FPS security recommendations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes the new obligations placed on FSCs and DHS.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes scope limitation to GSA/fee-paying facilities and the 5-year sunset.

effective_dates.why: Notes 90-day FSC response deadline, 270-day first report deadline, and 5-year sunset.

major_provisions_covered.why: Omits the surveillance technology report requirement (180-day deadline per Section 2(d)), which is a distinct material provision.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
